scripts.build:sidecar:lean:compressed: yarn sidecar:clean && MIMIR_SIDECAR_ARCHIVE=gz node scripts/build_backend_sidecar.mjs --profile lean
scripts.build:sidecar:aggressive:compressed: yarn sidecar:clean && MIMIR_SIDECAR_ARCHIVE=gz node scripts/build_backend_sidecar.mjs --profile aggressive
scripts.package: yarn sidecar:preflight && yarn build:sidecar && yarn tauri build
scripts.package:lean: yarn sidecar:preflight && yarn build:sidecar:lean && yarn tauri build
scripts.package:aggressive: yarn sidecar:preflight && yarn build:sidecar:aggressive && yarn tauri build
scripts.package:mac:dmg: yarn sidecar:preflight && yarn build:sidecar && yarn tauri build --bundles dmg
scripts.package:mac:app: yarn sidecar:preflight && yarn build:sidecar && yarn tauri build --bundles app && node scripts/zip_macos_app_bundle.mjs
